    genomics_data.expression_level,
    genomics_data.p_value,
    genomics_data.adjusted_p_value,
    genomics_data.log_fold_change,
    genomics_data.standard_error,
    genomics_data.confidence_interval,
    datasets.name AS dataset_name,
    datasets.description AS dataset_description,
    datasets.type AS dataset_type,
    datasets.date_uploaded,
    datasets.data_source,
    datasets.data_format,
    gene_annotations.annotation,
    gene_annotations.source AS annotation_source,
    gene_annotations.category AS annotation_category,
    users.name AS user_name,
    users.email,
    users.role,
    users.institution,
    access_logs.access_date,
    access_logs.access_type,
    access_logs.query_used,
    dataset_versions.version,
    dataset_versions.date_uploaded AS dataset_version_uploaded,
    dataset_versions.description AS dataset_version_description,
    dataset_tags.tag,
    dataset_categories.category AS dataset_category,
    genomics_data_analysis.analysis,
    genomics_data_analysis.results AS analysis_results,
    genomics_data_analysis.algorithm_used,
    genomics_data_quality_control.qc_results,
    genomics_data_quality_control.qc_method,
    genomics_data_validation.validation_results,
    genomics_data_validation.validation_method,
    genomics_data_publications.pmid,
    genomics_data_publications.title,
    genomics_data_publications.authors,
    genomics_data_publications.journal,
    genomics_data_funding.grant_id,
    genomics_data_funding.agency,
    genomics_data_funding.amount,
    genomics_data_collaborations.collaborator,
    genomics_data_collaborations.institution AS collaborator_institution
FROM
    experiments
    INNER JOIN datasets ON experiments.experiment_id = datasets.experiment_id
    INNER JOIN genomics_data ON datasets.dataset_id = genomics_data.dataset_id
    INNER JOIN genes ON genomics_data.gene_id = genes.gene_id
    INNER JOIN gene_annotations ON genes.gene_id = gene_annotations.gene_id
    INNER JOIN access_logs ON datasets.dataset_id = access_logs.dataset_id
    INNER JOIN users ON users.user_id = access_logs.user_id
    INNER JOIN dataset_versions ON datasets.dataset_id = dataset_versions.dataset_id
    INNER JOIN dataset_tags ON datasets.dataset_id = dataset_tags.dataset_id
    INNER JOIN dataset_categories ON datasets.dataset_id = dataset_categories.dataset_id
    INNER JOIN genomics_data_analysis ON genomics_data.genomics_data_id = genomics_data_analysis.genomics_data_id
    INNER JOIN genomics_data_quality_control ON genomics_data.genomics_data_id = genomics_data_quality_control.genomics_data_id
    INNER JOIN genomics_data_validation ON genomics_data.genomics_data_id = genomics_data_validation.genomics_data_id
    INNER JOIN genomics_data_publications ON genomics_data.genomics_data_id = genomics_data_publications.genomics_data_id
    INNER JOIN genomics_data_funding ON genomics_data.genomics_data_id = genomics_data_funding.genomics_data_id
    INNER JOIN genomics_data_collaborations ON genomics_data.genomics_data_id = genomics_data_collaborations.genomics_data_id;
```
